title: puccinellia angustata
intro: Puccinellia angustata, also known as Salt Grass or Puccinellia, is a perennial grass species native to the coastal regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Puccinellia angustata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. In herbal preparations, Puccinellia angustata is often used as an infusion or decoction, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
